desc:
It carries heavy objects without a word.

As it does its work,
the number on the electronic display seems to update.

Machines exist for a purpose.
You feel like you should give it an order.

options.messageDesc: Envy & Gluttony & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

result:
A purposeless machine is bound to lose
the meaning of its existence, even if it is functional.

A machine whose purpose is to do nothing
will do whatever it takes to achieve its directive.

With a loud boiling noise,
the machine’s body begins to heat, expelling hot steam.

Seeing it glow a dangerous-looking hue,
we quickly escaped the room.

options.message: Order it to carry luggage faster.
options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn 2 Tremor E.G.O Gifts
result:
The machine begins to carry luggage faster and faster.
The numbers on the vacuum tube displays begin to rise rapidly, and so does the steam fuming from its body.
It doesn't take too long for the machine to move all the luggage.
Now that there wasn't anything left to carry, the machine slowly turns in our direction.
One of the Sinners shouts, 'Wait, we're not luggage!' but it falls on deaf ears.

successDesc:
It lifts a nearby object
to carry it from left to right.

The count on its body went up by 1.

Just as you started to wonder if that was it,
the machine replaced one of its vacuum tubes with a new one.

It presented the old one to you,
and naturally, you accepted.
failureDesc:
It lifts a nearby object
to carry it from right to left.

While it was moving the object,
it suddenly came to a halt.

The vacuum tubes in its body suddenly flicker.

After flashing random letters and numbers,
everything shut off.

With its power gone, the object slipped from its hands and fell.
…A few of us were standing in the impact zone.

2: Win the battle to gain E.G.O Gifts "Nixie Divergence" & "Clockwork Spring"
